# Environment and OST variables

Supported `OST_*` environment, GitHub repository, and CMake-cache variables. Sourced from [`support/environment-variables.toml`](../../support/environment-variables.toml).

Secret values are consumed from the environment and must never be committed or printed. Generated output variables apply only to the named child/session.

| Variable | Kind | Direction | Scope | Secret | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `OST_HOME` | environment | input | all commands | no | Override the user store root (default: ~/.ost). |
| `OST_NINJA` | environment | input | ost build | no | Ninja executable override when --ninja is not supplied. |
| `OST_USD_ROOT` | environment | input | ost runtime pull | no | Existing OpenUSD install adopted when --from-usd is omitted. |
| `OST_USD_SRC` | environment | input | ost runtime pull --build | no | OpenUSD source tree used when --build has no path. |
| `OST_USD_DEPS` | environment | input | ost runtime pull --build | no | Platform-path-separated dependency prefixes used when --deps is omitted. |
| `OST_UV` | environment | input | ost uv | no | uv executable override. |
| `OST_UV_ALLOW_SHADOWED` | environment | input | ost uv | no | Allow a project dependency to shadow a runtime-provided package when set. |
| `OST_REGISTRY_TOKEN` | environment | input | OCI artifact pull | yes | Static bearer token accepted for registry reads, not pushes. |
| `OST_REGISTRY_USER` | environment | input | OCI artifact push | yes | Registry username used with OST_REGISTRY_PASSWORD. |
| `OST_REGISTRY_PASSWORD` | environment | input | OCI artifact push | yes | Registry password/token used with OST_REGISTRY_USER. |
| `OST_DEVSHELL` | environment | output | ost devshell child | no | Selected runtime id; also prevents recursively nesting a devshell. |
| `OST_RUNTIME_PREFIX` | environment | output | ost devshell child | no | Selected runtime store prefix. |
| `OST_CI_CELL` | environment | output | generated CI job | no | Support-cell identity embedded in validation evidence. |
| `OST_CI_LANE` | environment | output | generated CI job | no | Execution lane embedded in validation evidence. |
| `OST_CI_RUNNER_PROFILE` | environment | output | generated CI job | no | Runner profile embedded in validation evidence. |
| `OST_CI_RUNS_ON` | environment | output | generated CI job | no | Concrete runner labels embedded in validation evidence. |
| `OST_CI_RUNTIME_ARTIFACT` | environment | output | generated CI job | no | Pinned runtime artifact digest embedded in validation evidence. |
| `OST_CI_PLUGIN_ARTIFACT` | environment | output | generated CI job | no | Pinned plugin artifact digest embedded in validation evidence when present. |
| `OST_CI_MINIMUM_TRUST` | environment | output | generated CI job | no | Effective artifact trust floor embedded in validation evidence. |
| `OST_CI_DISABLE_CACHE` | github-variable | input | generated hosted CI | no | Repository variable; true bypasses the hosted OST artifact cache. |
| `OST_RUN_NATIVE_LIFECYCLE` | environment | input | repository tests on Windows | no | Opt in to native compiler lifecycle integration tests. |
| `OST_RENDERER_ADAPTERS` | cmake-cache | input | managed renderer build | no | Semicolon-separated renderer adapter intents; v0.17 defines hydra2. |
| `OST_RUNTIME_ROOT` | cmake-cache | output | managed renderer build | no | Effective OpenUSD artifact prefix recorded for launch fingerprint checks. |
| `OST_RUNTIME_ID` | cmake-cache | output | managed renderer build | no | Selected runtime identity recorded for launch fingerprint checks. |
| `OST_RUNTIME_DIGEST` | cmake-cache | output | managed renderer build | no | Selected runtime digest recorded for build provenance. |
